story.text:
# ✨ Witness Birth
**🪶 → 👁️ → ⏱️ → 🪢**
*faunia · attestation · V59*

Attest the moment of admission. Record the timestamp. Bind the new VRC edge between Mage and spawned agent. The completion of the Spawn phase.

> The wild thing has crossed the threshold. The witness is the operational fact.

*Keywords:* witness · attest · VRC · timestamp · v59
